清体力前传送至任意锚点: Teleport to anchor before clearing power
单次上限300点，全部使用需要将“任务完成后”选项修改为“循环”，然后点击“完整: Max 300 power per run. To use all, change 'After Task' to 'Loop' and click 'Full Run'
单次上限5个，全部使用需要将“任务完成后”选项修改为“循环”，然后点击“完整运行: Max 5 per run. To use all, change 'After Task' to 'Loop' and click 'Full Run'
自动分解四星遗器（建议在游戏内配置结算遗器时自动分解）: Auto salvage 4-star Relics (Recommended to config in-game auto salvage)
侵蚀隧洞、饰品提取、历战余响和模拟宇宙完成后自动分解四星及以下遗器: Auto salvage 4-star and below Relics after Cavern of Corrosion, Ornament Extraction, Echo of War, and Simulated Universe
体力优先合成沉浸器（建议直接通过饰品提取获取位面饰品）: Prioritize power for Immersifier (Recommended to get Ornaments via Extraction)
无论何时都要使用支援角色，即使日常实训中的要求已经完成: Always use Support Character, even if Daily Training requirement is met
根据培养目标刷取行迹与遗器副本，如果无法获取培养目标则回退到默认的副本设置: Farm Trace and Relic dungeons based on targets. Fallback to default if targets unavailable
目标有足够资源后，执行饰品提取的次数，其余时间执行侵蚀隧洞: Run Ornament Extraction this many times after target has enough resources, otherwise run Cavern of Corrosion
每周体力优先完成三次「历战余响」，支持配置从周几后开始执行，仅限完整运行生效: Prioritize 3 Echo of War runs weekly. Configurable start day. Only effective in Full Run
上次完成历战余响的时间: Last Echo of War completion time
请确保背包中有足够的 “熄灭原核” 用于合成 “微光原核”: Ensure enough 'Extinguished Core' in inventory to synthesize 'Glimmering Core'
请解锁混沌回忆并配置了队伍后再打开该选项: Unlock Forgotten Hall and configure team before enabling
自动领取「星轨专票」或「星琼」，包含巡星之礼、巡光之礼和庆典祝礼活动: Auto claim 'Star Rail Special Pass' or 'Stellar Jade' from log-in events
存在双倍次数时体力优先「侵蚀隧洞」: Prioritize 'Cavern of Corrosion' when double rewards available
存在双倍次数时体力优先「饰品提取」: Prioritize 'Ornament Extraction' when double rewards available
自动将3星光锥进行叠加以节省背包空间: Auto superimpose 3-star Light Cones to save inventory space
上次检测到完成货币战争积分奖励的时间: Last Currency Wars reward claim time
在领取积分奖励后自动执行位面饰品快速提取消耗深度沉浸器: Auto Quick Ornament Extraction using Immersifiers after claiming point rewards
上次检测到完成差分宇宙积分奖励的时间: Last Divergent Universe reward claim time
通常用于反复刷取遗器经验和灵之珠泪（代替敌方掉落素材）直到每周上限: Used to farm Relic XP and Lost Dust (replacing enemy drops) until weekly cap
差分宇宙无法正常运行时，可尝试打开此选项: Try enabling this if Divergent Universe fails to run
自动执行饰品提取/领取沉浸奖励: Auto Ornament Extraction / Claim Immersion Reward
类别为“差分宇宙”时，在领取积分奖励后自动执行饰品提取消耗沉浸器。类别为“模拟宇: For 'Divergent Universe', auto extract ornaments after claiming rewards. For 'Simulated Universe', auto claim immersion rewards.
注意中途停止不会计数，0 代表不指定，使用模拟宇宙原版逻辑: Note: Stops mid-run don't count. 0 means unspecified (original logic)
难度 (0为不配置，仅模拟宇宙生效): Difficulty (0 for not configured, Simulated Universe only)
上次运行混沌回忆的时间: Last Memory of Chaos run time
开启后，将改用云·星穹铁道来执行清体力等自动化任务。无需固定窗口，可在后台运行。: Enable to use Cloud StarRail for automation. Runs in background. (Simulated Universe and Fhoe-Rail still need full screen)
建议保持默认的“集成（Chrome For Testing）”效果最好: Recommended to keep default 'Integrated (Chrome For Testing)'
使用国内镜像下载浏览器和驱动: Use CN Mirror for Browser/Driver Download
保存浏览器数据（游戏的登录状态和本地数据）: Save Browser Data (Login state and local data)
非 1920x1080 屏幕下，云游戏画面无法铺满屏幕，可以调整这个值改变画面缩: Adjust zoom if cloud game doesn't fill screen on non-1920x1080 displays
不支持模拟宇宙和锄大地: Not supported for Simulated Universe and Fhoe-Rail
未登录时自动切换为有窗口模式: Auto switch to windowed if not logged in
开启后：在无窗口模式检测到未登录时，将自动以有窗口模式重启浏览器以便登录；关闭后: Enabled: Reopens in windowed mode if login needed. Disabled: Tries QR login in headless mode.
如果勾选，除非循环模式，执行成功后暂停程序。: If checked, pauses program after success (except in Loop mode).
如果勾选，那么失败后直接退出，否则失败后暂停程序。: If checked, exits on failure. Otherwise pauses program.
“退出”指退出游戏，不再建议使用循环模式，请改用日志界面的定时运行功能: 'Exit' means exit game. Loop mode not recommended, use Scheduled Tasks in Log interface instead.
循环运行再次启动所需开拓力: Trailblaze Power needed to restart loop
用于循环运行及判断任务状态，默认凌晨四点: Used for loop runs and task status, default 4 AM
选择关闭窗口时的默认行为，也可以在关闭时由对话框询问: Choose default behavior when closing window, or ask every time
游戏启动前通过修改注册表或本地存储开启自动战斗和二倍速，并在清体力、货币战争和逐: Enables Auto-Battle/2x Speed via registry/storage before launch. Checks/maintains state during Power runs, Currency Wars, and Treasures Lightward
使用 DirectML 加速 OCR 识别，若 GPU 负载高导致 OCR 过慢: Use DirectML for OCR. Auto disables if GPU load high causes slow OCR (Win 10 18362+ only)
启用自动修改分辨率并关闭自动 HDR: Auto Change Resolution & Disable Auto HDR
通过软件启动游戏会自动修改 1920x1080 分辨率并关闭自动 HDR，不影响: Auto set 1920x1080 & disable Auto HDR when launching via app. Doesn't affect manual launch (CN & Global supported)
通过快捷方式、官方启动器、运行中的游戏进程等方式尝试自动配置游戏路径（支持国服和: Try auto-config game path via shortcuts, launcher, or running process (CN & Global supported)
默认开启，如果正在使用多显示器且无法正常截屏请关闭此选项重试: Default enabled. If using multi-monitor and screenshot fails, disable this and retry
通过任务计划程序在开机后自动执行完整运行模式（可能还需要自行配置电脑无需输入密码: Auto execute Full Run on startup via Task Scheduler (may need auto-login config)
配置秘技、地图、跃迁、停止任务等按键设置: Config keys for Technique, Map, Warp, Stop Task, etc.
更新将包含依赖组件，建议保持开启。若关闭此选项，需自行手动更新依赖组件，可能会导: Update includes dependencies. Recommended to keep on. If off, manual dependency update required, may cause errors.
此程序为免费开源项目，如果你付了钱请立刻退款\n如果喜欢本项目，可以微信赞赏送作:
This is free open source software. If you paid, request a refund immediately.
If you like it, consider buying the author a coffee ☕
Your support powers development! 🚀
请先停止当前任务后再启动新任务: Please stop current task before starting new one
检测到配置文件变化，已自动重新加载: Config file change detected, reloaded automatically
请检查所选浏览器是否存在，网络连接是否正常: Check if browser exists and network is normal
下载成功后，将自动启动云·星穹铁道: Will auto start Cloud StarRail after download
批量使用兑换码，每行一个，自动过滤空格等无效字符: Use redemption codes in bulk, one per line. Invalid characters like spaces will be filtered automatically
请等待当前获取完成: Please wait for current fetch to complete
喜欢就给个星星吧\\n拜托求求你啦|･ω･): Please give a star if you like it\nPretty please |･ω･)
您希望如何处理程序?: How do you want to handle the program?
记住我的选择,下次不再询问: Remember my choice, don't ask again
进入剧情页面后自动开始运行，支持大于等于 1920*1080 的 16:9 分辨: Auto run in story page. Supports >= 1920*1080 16:9 resolution. Not supported in Cloud StarRail.
检查程序获取的图像是否正确，支持OCR识别文字（可用于自行排查异常）: Check captured image correctness. Supports OCR text recognition (for debugging)
通过修改注册表解锁120帧率，如已解锁，再次点击将恢复60帧率（支持国服和国际服: Modify registry to unlock 120 FPS. Click again to restore 60 FPS (CN & Global supported)
以云游戏移动端 UI 的方式启动游戏，可搭配 UU远程 平板触控模式，启动后会将: Launch with Cloud Game Mobile UI. Use with UU Remote Tablet Mode. Command copied to clipboard.
请将游戏图像质量修改为自定义后重试: Please set Game Image Quality to Custom and retry
此功能依赖第三方程序实现: This feature relies on third-party software
https://github.com/winTEuser/Genshin_Sta:

Issues caused by this are not related to this project/team. Continue?
工作原理是通过 WriteProcessMemory 把代码写进游戏，是否继续？: Works by writing code into game via WriteProcessMemory. Continue?
确认继续并允许启用触屏模式？: Confirm continue and enable Touch Mode?
请在“设置”-->“程序”中配置正确的游戏路径: Please configure correct Game Path in Settings -> Program
确定要清空抽卡记录吗？此操作不可撤销。: Are you sure? This is irreversible.
抽卡记录为空，请先打开游戏内抽卡记录，再点击更新数据即可。\n\n你也可以从其他:
Warp history empty. Open in-game history and click Update Data.

You can also import from UIGF/SRGF apps like StarRail Warp Export or Starward.

Copy Link is for mini-programs or other software.
重要：请完全进入游戏（看到角色）后再进行导出，否则会读取前一个账号的UID，导致: Important: Enter game fully (see character) before export to avoid reading previous UID/mismatch.
当登录过期时尝试自动重新填写账号密码\n *此功能存在一定风险，请谨慎使用*:
Try auto-fill user/pass when login expired
 *Risk involved, use with caution*
已存在相同时间的任务，请选择其他时间: Task at this time exists, choose another
无法运行任务：父组件不支持 startTask: Cannot run: Parent doesn't support startTask
自动跳过 (当出现跳过按钮时自动点击): Auto Skip (Click Skip button when available)
Mirror酱 用户可以通过 CDK 高速更新（支持任意版本间增量更新）: High-speed update via CDK for MirrorChan users (Incremental update supported)
阅读时间太短了，多停留一会吧(>∀<): Reading time too short, stay a bit longer! (>∀<)
说明：清体力是根据选择的副本类型来判断，副本名称也会用于双倍活动: Note: Power clear based on Dungeon Type. Name also used for double events.
说明：{ } 中的内容会在实际发送时被替换，\\n 代表换行: Note: { } content replaced on send, \n is newline
每个队伍只允许一名角色配置为“秘技 / 开怪”: Only one character per team can be 'Technique / Start'
说明：左侧选择角色后，在右侧对应的文本框中填写好友名称。\\n例如好友名称为“持: Note: Select char on left, enter friend name on right.\nPartial match works (e.g., 'Dan' matches 'Dan Heng').\nIf name empty, searches only char.
体力计划会在清体力前优先执行，完成后自动从列表中删除: Power Plans run before clearing power. Deleted after completion.
已有任务在运行，按配置停止当前任务并在其结束后启动: {}: Task running, stopping current to start: {}
请将`小助手文件夹`加入杀毒软件排除项/白名单/信任区，然后重新解压覆盖一次: Add `Assistant Folder` to Antivirus whitelist/exclusion, then re-extract
请在 “设置 → 关于 → 更新源” 中选择 Mirror酱 并填写有效 CDK: Select MirrorChan in 'Settings -> About -> Source' and enter valid CDK
请稍候，更新检查仍在进行中: Please wait, update check in progress
喜欢就给个星星吧: Star us if you like it
说明：左侧选择角色后，在右侧对应的文本框中填写好友名称。\n例如好友名称为“持明:
Note: Select char on left, enter friend name on right.
Partial match supported (e.g. 'Dan' for 'Dan Heng').
If empty, search char only.
请确认是否已打开游戏抽卡记录: Please confirm if Warp History is open
铁骸的锈冢: Rusted Crypt of the Iron Carcass
至高，至阳，天空的化身: Sublime, Radiant, Avatar of the Sky
开启后可能提升运行速度，若出现错误、异常或不稳定，请关闭此选项: May improve performance. If errors, exceptions, or instability occur, please disable this option.
无法获取游戏窗口截图，请确认游戏窗口已打开: Unable to capture the game window screenshot. Please make sure the game window is open.
请先选择要上移的任务: Select task to move up first
当前任务已经位于最上方: The selected task is already at the top
默认开启，可以避免悬浮窗等干扰: Enabled by default to avoid interference from floating windows and similar overlays
当没有匹配到任何规则时，默认出战队伍：: Default team when no rules match:
获取方式：创建 Bot → @BotFather → /newbot → 获取: How to get: Create bot -> @BotFather -> /newbot -> get token
接收通知的用户 ID 或群组 ID（以 - 开头）: Recipient user ID or group ID (group IDs usually start with -)
可选参数，自定义 Telegram API 地址，例如 api.telegram: Optional: custom Telegram API URL, e.g. api.telegram.org
可选参数，例如 127.0.0.1:10808 或 socks5://127.0: Optional: e.g. 127.0.0.1:10808 or socks5://127.0.0.1:1080. If empty, use system PAC proxy
是否分开发送文字和图片，避免部分客户端不显示文字: Whether to send text and image separately to avoid text not showing in some clients
微信推送，适合轻量通知: WeChat push, suitable for lightweight notifications
可选参数，通知点击后复制内容: Optional: copy content when notification is clicked
可选参数，推送加密密钥，需在 Bark APP 中配置相同的密钥: Optional: push encryption key, must match Bark app settings
可选参数，支持 cbc 或 ecb，需与 Bark APP 中配置的算法一致: Optional: supports cbc or ecb, must match Bark app settings
部分邮箱需要填写授权码（如 QQ 邮箱）: Some providers require app password (e.g. QQ Mail)
可选参数，发件人邮箱，默认使用 user: Optional: sender email, defaults to user
可选参数，收件人邮箱，默认使用 user: Optional: recipient email, defaults to user
可选参数，是否跳过 SSL 证书验证: Optional: whether to skip SSL certificate verification
可选参数，私聊接收用户 ID: Optional: recipient user ID for private chat
可选参数，群聊接收群组 ID: Optional: recipient group ID for group chat
Go-cqhttp 项目已停止维护: Go-cqhttp project is no longer maintained
可选参数，通知优先级，范围 1-10，越高优先级越高。1-3:仅图标，4-7:图: Optional: priority level 1-10. Higher means more prominent. 1-3: icon only, 4-7: icon + sound, 8-10: icon + sound + vibration
可选参数，嵌入消息颜色，十六进制颜色值（如：0x3498db）: Optional: embed message color in hex (e.g. 0x3498db)
发送图片时必填：飞书应用 AppId: Required when sending images: Feishu app AppId
发送图片时必填：飞书应用 Secret: Required when sending images: Feishu app Secret
接收消息的用户 ID 或频道 ID: Recipient user ID or channel ID
可选参数，1 为私聊，9 为频道: Optional: 1 for private chat, 9 for channel
可自定义请求方法、请求头和请求体: Supports custom request method, headers, and body
可选参数，请求头 JSON 格式字符串，如：{\"Authorization\": Optional: headers in JSON string, e.g. {"Authorization": "Bearer token"}
可选参数，请求体模板 JSON 格式字符串，支持 {title}/{conten: Optional: body template as JSON string, supports placeholders {title}/{content}/{image}
请求地址，OneBot 可填写 send_msg 接口 URL: Request URL. For OneBot, you can use send_msg endpoint URL
请求方法，通常 get 或 post: Request method, usually GET or POST
数据类型，通常为 data 或 json: Data type, usually data or json
可选参数，图片消息模板，{image} 会替换为 Base64: Optional: image message template, {image} will be replaced with Base64
请求体模板，{message} 会替换为标题和内容: Request body template, {message} will be replaced with title and content
开启后，完整运行结束时将所有通知合并为一条发送: When enabled, all notifications are merged and sent as one message after a full run completes.
关闭后推送消息时不再发送截图: Do not include screenshots when sending notifications
自动战斗检测 (检测到未自动战斗时按V开启): Auto Battle Detection (Press V when auto-battle is off)
打开模拟宇宙项目主页（停止维护）: Open Simulated Universe Project Homepage (Stop Maintain)
在领取积分奖励后自动执行饰品提取消耗沉浸器: Auto Ornament Extraction using Immersifiers after claiming point rewards
运行若出现问题可尝试开启，适配低性能环境，云游戏默认使用此模式: If issues occur, try enabling this. Optimized for low-performance environments. Cloud Game uses this mode by default.
自动领取模拟宇宙沉浸奖励: Auto Claim Simulated Universe Immersion Rewards
类别为“模拟宇宙”时，自动领取沉浸奖励: When category is 'Simulated Universe', auto claim immersion rewards
选择启动时恢复的窗口状态: Select window state to restore on startup
欢迎关注我们的B站账号，获取最新动态和教程: Follow our Bilibili account for the latest updates and tutorials
任务菜单中的菜单项名称不能为空: Menu item name in task menu cannot be empty
难度等级（难度6对应常规演算星阶模式）: Difficulty Level (Level 6 corresponds to regular calculation star-rank mode)
自定义差分宇宙「选择下一站」的站点优先级: Customize site priority for "Choose Next Station" in Differential Universe
留空则使用系统代理；支持 http:// 和 socks5://: Leave empty to use system proxy; supports http:// and socks5://
根据所选策略，在遇到特定词条或词条组合时允许重开: Allow restart when specific tags or tag combinations appear based on the selected strategy
未配置，阿格莱雅策略下将跳过该角色，需要填入自己游戏名称: Not configured. This character will be skipped in Aglaea strategy. Enter the name shown in your game.
提升晋升等级，推荐在最低职级选择默认策略。提升职级等级，推荐在最高职级选择阿格莱: To level up promotion rank, use the default strategy at the lowest rank. To level up rank, use the Aglaea strategy at the highest rank.
开启后，仅在首领节点尝试装备武器，只推荐在最低职级时开启: When enabled, weapon equip is only attempted at boss nodes. Only recommended to enable at the lowest rank.
